title: ENABLE_NDEBUG = 1 fail.
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
Current head compile and tests passed but if I only change 
ENABLE_NDEBUG := 1
it will fail.

This works.
```
ENABLE_NDEBUG := 0
 ./yosys --version
Yosys 0.9+4052 (git sha1 0ccc7229c, clang 11.0.0 -fPIC -Os)
```

```
clang --version
Apple clang version 11.0.0 (clang-1100.0.33.16)
Target: x86_64-apple-darwin20.3.0
Thread model: posix

```
## Expected behavior

make test 
Passed "make test".

## Actual behavior
This doesn't work.
(yes I cut my yosys-abc path away on this post .....)
```
ENABLE_NDEBUG := 1

Passed logic.ys
Passed lutram.ys
sh: line 1: 95834 Abort trap: 6           ...../yosys-abc -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-mcIbVt/abc.script 2>&1
ERROR: ABC: execution of command "...../yosys-abc -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-mcIbVt/abc.script 2>&1" failed: return code 134.
make[1]: *** [mux.ys] Error 1
make: *** [test] Error 2
```
code_blocks:
ENABLE_NDEBUG := 1

Passed logic.ys
Passed lutram.ys
sh: line 1: 95834 Abort trap: 6           ...../yosys-abc -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-mcIbVt/abc.script 2>&1
ERROR: ABC: execution of command "...../yosys-abc -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-mcIbVt/abc.script 2>&1" failed: return code 134.
make[1]: *** [mux.ys] Error 1
make: *** [test] Error 2
